actionPlan.title: Mathematics Fundamentals Review
actionPlan.description: Spend 2 hours reviewing HCF and LCM concepts, practicing with past tests and exercises, and seeking help for Word Problems

actionPlan.title: Quick Geography and Chemistry Revision

actionPlan.title: Economics and Biology Consolidation
actionPlan.description: Use 30 minutes to review Economics and Biology notes, reinforcing understanding and identifying any gaps

report.summary: The student's overall performance indicates a strong foundation in certain subjects, but there are areas that require immediate attention to improve accuracy and consistency. Chemistry and Economics are notable strengths, while Mathematics and Geography need significant improvement.
weaknesses: Struggles with Mathematics, particularly in HCF and LCM, and Word Problems
Poor performance in Geography and Double Displacement Reactions in Chemistry

focusDistribution.reason: Fundamental re-learning required to address persistent weaknesses
Quick revision and practice to improve overall subject performance
Consolidation and reinforcement of existing knowledge to maintain high standards
